Product Description: Melanotan II is a synthetic melanocortin peptide that activates melanocortin receptors (primarily MC1R and MC4R). It stimulates melanin production in the skin and also influences appetite regulation, libido, and mood through central nervous system pathways. Unlike Melanotan I, MT-2 crosses the blood–brain barrier, which explains its broader systemic effects beyond pigmentation.
Product Information: Melanotan II supports increased melanin production, leading to enhanced skin pigmentation and improved tolerance to UV exposure. In addition to its tanning effects, it may support libido enhancement, mild appetite suppression, and mood elevation due to its action on central melanocortin receptors. These combined effects make Melanotan II a multifaceted peptide often used for aesthetic, metabolic, and wellness-oriented goals.
